channel.title: Oracle on MCP Toolbox for Databases
channel.description: Recent content in Oracle on MCP Toolbox for Databases

item.title: Oracle Source
item.description:
About

Oracle Database is a multi-model database management system produced and marketed by Oracle Corporation. It is commonly used for running online transaction processing (OLTP), data warehousing (DW), and mixed (OLTP & DW) database workloads.

Available Tools

No tools found to display.

Requirements

Database User

This source uses standard authentication. You will need to create an Oracle user to log in to the database with the necessary permissions.

Oracle Driver Requirement (Conditional)

The Oracle source offers two connection drivers:
